description: A proportional (100%) stacked bar: one full-width bar per category (Region on rows) whose axis is percent-of-total Sales (a PctTotal table calc on cols), segmented by a second dimension (Category on color) and with mark size driven by a FIXED [Region] LOD of SUM([Sales]) so each region's absolute magnitude reads through its bar thickness. Shows each category's composition normalized to 100%. Structurally compiled, not render-verified.

slots.notes: The category on rows — one proportional bar per member; also the FIXED-LOD grain ({ FIXED [Region]: SUM([Sales]) }). Template column carries aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]' (cosmetic secondary-role hint). replaceFieldReferences rewrites [Region] on the shelf AND inside the LOD formula on bind.

The measure on cols as a percent-of-total ([pcto:sum:Sales:qk:3], a PctTotal table calc that rides along) AND the FIXED-LOD numerator. Used at a single base derivation (Sum) in both, so no qualified key is required.
The stacking dimension on color — the segments composing each region's 100% bar.

calcs.notes: The 'Regional Sales' FIXED LOD sizing each region's bar by its absolute total ({ FIXED [Region]: SUM([Sales]) }). A self-closing <calculation>, so parseTemplateCalcs sees it — a declared calc slot. Both refs are bindable slots (region, sales); replaceFieldReferences rewrites them on bind. The LOD grain assumes the bound row dimension IS the aggregation grain (see hazard fixed-lod-grain).

hazards.detail: The size measure is a FIXED [Region] LOD ({ FIXED [Region]: SUM([Sales]) }). replaceFieldReferences rewrites [Region] to the bound row dimension, so the LOD grain follows the binding — but the design ASSUMES the bound row dimension is the correct aggregation grain. Binding a row dimension finer/coarser than the intended magnitude grain makes the FIXED value (and thus the bar thickness) mismatch the visible bar's grain.

The cols axis [pcto:sum:Sales:qk:3] is a <column-instance> of base [Sales] carrying a nested <table-calc type='PctTotal'> (Percent of Total). Because it is a column-INSTANCE with a nested table-calc (not a <column><calculation>), parseTemplateCalcs (self-closing <calculation> only) never sees it — it is NOT a declared calc slot and rides along verbatim on cols. Its base is the bindable 'sales' slot; replaceFieldReferences rewrites [Sales] inside the instance on bind. The PctTotal normalizes each bar to 100% across the addressed partition.

Region carries a <manual-sort> whose <dictionary> lists source members ('South','Central','East','West'). The buckets are source-calendar literals; on a differently-membered bound dimension they do not match and the manual sort silently resets to default order (cosmetic — no binding break, no data change).
The FIXED LOD references the bare bindable [Region]/[Sales]; templates.ts rewriteFormulaFieldRefs repairs them on bind ONLY because both are bindable bare-key slots. Gate #6 asserts both are bound.
